plan_metadata.name: General Teams Agent Azure OpenAI ts playground

steps.description: Click on the "Teams Agents and Apps" option within the dropdown menu under the "New Project" interface in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit.
Click on the "General Teams Agent" option in the dropdown menu within the "Teams Agent or App Using Microsoft Teams SDK" interface.
Click the "TypeScript" option in the "Programming Language" selection dropdown within Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Default folder /home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects" option in the "Workspace Folder" dialog of Visual Studio Code.
